title: Avoid Infinite Recursion
description: Recursive methods must always reach a base case where the recursion is stopped. Infinite recursion is caused by logical errors and it will crash your application.
recommendation: Ensure that recursive methods have a base case and end recursion with a return statement.
impact: Infinite recursion can cause a StackOverflowError and crash the application.

checks.message: Ensure that recursive methods have a base case and end recursion with a return statement.
